title: NOMOS Execution Request
description: Request body for POST /api/v1/verify — evaluates a decision context against a sealed artifact

artifact_id.description: ID of the sealed artifact to evaluate against

version.description: Artifact version to use. Omit to use the latest sealed version.

decision.description: Optional human-readable label for the decision being requested (e.g. 'approve_loan'). Does not affect rule evaluation.

context.description: Key-value map of input fields evaluated against rule conditions. Keys MUST match field paths referenced in the artifact's rule conditions.

agent_id.description: Identifier of the agent submitting this request. Required when the artifact contains an agents manifest (NOMOS-SPEC-002). MUST match a registered agent_id or the request will be rejected.

request_id.description: UUIDv4 identifying this request. Used for idempotency and replay-attack prevention. Runtimes SHOULD reject duplicate request_id values within a 5-minute window.
